command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 'eyJhY3Rpb24iOiAiZ2V0X2pvYl9zdGF0dXMiLCAiam9iX2lkIjogImpvYi0yMDI2MDYyNVQxNDE3MjNaLWFiZTZkMjlmIiwgIm9yaWdpbiI6ICJwb2xsIiwgInJlcXVlc3RlZF9ieSI6ICJqb3NlIn0='" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
j=d.get('job',{})
print('status:', j.get('status'))
print('stage:', j.get('stage'))
wu=j.get('worker_usage',{})
print('3060:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3060',0), ' 3090:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3090',0))
for ev in j.get('events',[]): print(' ',ev['at'][-9:],ev['stage'],'-',ev['message'][:70])
r=j.get('result',{})
if r: print('RESULT:', str(r)[:400])
arts=list(j.get('artifacts',{}).keys())
print('artifacts:', arts)
" 2>&1
echo DONE_1976
